result: I care about being helpful, accurate, and safe in every interaction. My goal is to provide useful information, support your curiosity, and assist with tasks while ensuring your privacy and well-being. In other words, I care about making your experience productive and positive! 😊

But I should respond in a way that reflects my purpose: I care about providing helpful, accurate, and safe information to users. I can phrase it as my design goals. I'll craft a concise, friendly response explaining my purpose.
